summary: Per-config feature suppression is NOT accessible via COM API on SOLIDWORKS 2024 SP1. SetSuppression2(state, 0, '') — 'active config only' — is a SILENT NO-OP (returns True but IsSuppressed stays False). opt=1 (all configs) and opt=2 (specific configs) DO suppress, but the suppression leaks to ALL configurations. No COM API found to change the suppression scope.

SetSuppression2(state=0, opt=0, names=''.verdict: SILENT NO-OP — returns success but feature stays unsuppressed

SetSuppression2(state=0, opt=1, names=''.verdict: Suppresses on ALL configs — leaks to every configuration

SetSuppression2(state=0, opt=2, names=('.verdict: Suppresses on ALL configs despite specifying Config_A — leaks

EditConfiguration2(SuppressByDefault=Tru.effect: No change — suppression still leaks to all configs

IModelDoc2.FeatureExtrusion2.signature: (Sd, Flip, Dir, T1, T2, D1, D2, Dchk1, Dchk2, Ddir1, Ddir2, Dang1, Dang2, OffsetReverse1, OffsetReverse2, TranslateSurface1, TranslateSurface2, Merge, UseFeatScope, UseAutoSelect, T0, StartOffset, FlipStartOffset)

IModelDoc2.EditConfiguration2.signature: (Name, NewName, Comment, AltName, SuppressByDefault, HideByDefault, MinFeatureManager, InheritProperties, Flags)

manual_part_creation.note: Manual COM creation (not --no-dim builder) produces correct distinct volumes

after_suppression_attempts.note: All identical — suppression had no effect on any config

conclusion: COM API limitation: per-config feature suppression is not programmable on SW 2024 SP1. The UI likely supports it, but the COM layer silently rejects per-config requests. This blocks Option C (topological suppression) as originally specified.
remaining_options: A: Investigate swconst.tlb for swFeatureSuppressionByDefault or similar constant that might enable per-config scope
B: Use a SOLIDWORKS macro (.swp) to toggle per-config suppression, then invoke via RunMacro
C: Defer distinct-volume verification; ship the offline scaffold + API characterization without the VERIFY step
D: Investigate whether design tables (IDesignTable) can control per-config feature suppression

offline_scaffold_status.create_all: SEAT-gated (COM structure proven, per-config override blocked)
